channel.title: Go Humble! RSS Games
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle games bundles!

item.title: Humble 15th Anniversary - Indie Icons Showcase
item.description: An anniversary present from us to you!
item.content:encoded:
Happy Anniversary to us! We’re celebrating 15 years of Humble Bundle with another extra-special bundle of our favorite indie games! Guide a cursed orphan through a demon-infested castle before your body turns to crystal in Castlevania’s spiritual successor Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night! Play an upgraded spin on an old favorite in iconic roguelike Risk of Rain Returns, where the passenger of a crashed freighter must survive on an alien planet of monsters! Climb a haunted mountain and defeat nightmares, panic, and self-doubt in Celeste! There are even more great games in this bundle we’re sure you’ll love just as much as we do, so grab them now, and support the Electronic Frontier Foundation with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027.

item.title: Build, Shuffle, Battle!
item.content:encoded:
Build, shuffle, and battle throughout an all-star collection of inventive deckbuilders! Get tactical in Wildfrost, a roguelike deckbuilder where you’ll fight to collect cards strong enough to defrost an eternal winter! Turn up the fun dial in The Spirit Lift, a retro analog-style deckbuilder set in a haunted 1990s hotel. Or uncover the mysteries of BOOK OF HOURS, a narrative RPG with deckbuilding elements set in a fictional 1930s world filled with hidden gods. Shuffle new games into your personal collection for a price you choose, and help support the TD Foundation with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027

item.title: Heavenly Bullets
item.description: Get Sodaman, Greedland, Army of Ruin, God Of Weapons and more!
item.content:encoded:
The thrills never stop in this bundle of action and survival games that will test your mettle and launch you to new heights! Slaughter monsters and turn yourself into an arsenal of weapons in Greedland! Fight off hordes of enemies and ascend the Tower of Zhor in action roguelike God of Weapons! Live out your ’80s martial arts dreams by mastering fighting combos and turning everyday objects into deadly weapons in Karate Survivor! Join the melee and get this high octane bundle at the price of your choice, and support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 29th, 2027

item.title: Ticket to Ride: All Aboard Collection
item.description: All aboard your new favorite game!
item.content:encoded:
Get ready for your next steam-powered adventure with this digital Ticket to Ride bundle—which includes digital copies of the main game and a haul of expansions! Ride the rails of iconic American train lines in the original version, or plan your international jaunt into the Nordic countries, the nations of Europe, the cherry-lined railways of Japan, and the jungles and savannahs at the Heart of Africa. Plan your routes, challenge your friends, and fill the world with trains! Get this bundle before it leaves the station at the price of your choosing, and support the baby banks of Little Village, providing clothes and toys for babies in need.

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 29th, 2027

item.title: Creature Feature Bundle
item.content:encoded:
If this reality has seemed a little boring lately, why not step into a new one? Our latest VR bundle from Creature invites you to don your headsets and enter new worlds full of fascinating stories and exciting challenges! This curated selection includes Maestro, a VR conductor simulator game where your hands control the music of an entire orchestra! Try out The Light Brigade, a roguelike VR shooter set in a ruined world whose soldiers fight to free themselves from corruption and darkness! Stick it to the man with Crime Shop Simulator: A Prison Boss Game and craft and sell all the not-quite-legal merch the mayor of your city keeps banning—without getting sent back to the slammer! There are even more fun challenges to take on in this bundle of VR games, so get it now at the price of your choice, and support Stop AAPI Hate with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027

item.title: Mexican Entertainment System Bundle
item.content:encoded:
The all-new Mexican Entertainment System Bundle will boot up your love for exceptional Mexican-made games! Unwind and relax with Lonesome Village, a cozy puzzle-solving life sim without combat where you’ll save the village from nefarious evils. Turn heads, drop jaws, and let your light shine in RKGK/Rakugaki, an action-packed single-layer 3D platformer. Get stuck on A Tiny Sticker Tale, a cozy lil’ adventure about changing the world using the power of stickers! Join our fiesta of great Mexican-led games before they’re gone and help support Doctors Without Borders with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 22nd, 2027

item.title: PLAYISM Publisher Bundle - 2026
item.content:encoded:
Play games that pack a punch from PLAYISM! Add a little wacky to your life with DEEEER Simulator: Your Average Everyday Deer Game, the “Slow-life town destruction game”. Experience Bright Memory: Infinite, the lightning-fast fusion of the FPS and action genres. Or escape an endless underground passageway using only your observational skills in The Exit 8. Pay what you want for the hottest titles by PLAYISM, and help support War Child when you shop with Humble Bundle!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before May 20th, 2027.

item.title: Dead Rising: Shop 'Til You Drop Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Grab a bat, bow, teddy bear explosive, or… shopping cart? Everything and anything is a weapon in Dead Rising, your journey to slay gigantic oceans of zombies in tight domestic settings. Play as freelance photographer Frank West as he uses his charm and creativity to survive. Experience Dead Rising Deluxe Remaster, Frank West’s first adventure with a new coat of paint, at our base-tier pricing—and get the complete Dead Rising legacy collection when you purchase our higher bundle tier. Unlock the ultimate zombie-horde-hunting collection and help support Breakthrough T1D with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before November 20, 2026

item.title: MECHA MANIA
item.content:encoded:
Be honest: you’ve always wanted to jump inside the cockpit of a giant battle robot and join the fight to save humanity. We know you have, which is why we’ve designed this bundle full of mecha madness video games just for you! Design and customize your Mechanical Assault Skeleton Suit and fight giant alien beasts in M.A.S.S. Builder! Build a base and soup up your mech as you take on the role of veteran pilot Clem in the Wild West-influenced action game Bounty Star! Join a team of mining security robot pilots and investigate a solar system of mysterious alien worlds in Vox Machinae! All of these and more are included in this bundle of mecha mayhem, so grab it now at the price of your choosing and support World Central Kitchen with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before May 15th, 2027.

item.title: Your Move: Turn Based Games
item.content:encoded:
Whether you’re a master strategist or just looking for some idle fun exploring an exciting world, there’s a turn-based game out there just for you. As a matter of fact, it’s probably included in our new bundle full of RPGs and strategy games with stories that flow based on the decisions you make! Bring a set of fantastical digital miniatures to life in Moonbreaker, a tactical skirmish game set inside a universe created by Brandon Sanderson! Use the power of lucid dreaming to navigate a labyrinth of nightmares, battles, and puzzles in Deep Sleep: Labyrinth of the Forsaken! Traverse underground caverns, battle adversaries, and solve the mysteries of Dungeons of Aether! There’s a lot more to explore in this bundle of turn-based games, so grab them now at the price of your choosing, and help support Hilarity for Charity with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 13th, 2027
